author: y4rr
content: Audit follow-up #4/5 optim-A landed via 2-round dispatch (#691). Round 1 (truncated): silent CPU fallback at adam.rs:380 → opt-in FERROTORCH_ENABLE_GPU_FALLBACK + tracing::warn! + Err(GpuError::OutOfMemory) default; Arc-aliasing rigorous SAFETY at adam.rs:356; slice::from_raw_parts SAFETY at adam.rs:523-532; .expect-in-closures restructured; ParamGroup encapsulation (pub(crate) params + pub fn params/add_param accessors); lint baseline. Round 2 (redirect after workspace-build broke): 10 ParamGroup.params cascade sites migrated to .params() across 5 files (tests+examples+benchmarks); 17 *Config types given #[non_exhaustive] + 11 external caller sites migrated to mutate-after-default. CRITICAL discipline catch: subagent caught architect's factual error (architect's pre-flight said ..Default::default() would work with #[non_exhaustive]; wrong on stable Rust — error[E0639]). Subagent invoked rust-fix-discipline Step 1 §6 severity reassessment, chose mutate-after-default per dispatch authorization, surfaced honestly. Architect-mode trial of architect-checking-architect direction working again (similar to Unsupported-vs-NotImplementedOnCuda slip on item 8). One more named follow-up filed: #692 (with_* builder methods on 17 configs to replace verbose mutate-after-default at call sites). cargo build --workspace PASS, 322/322 optim tests PASS, full workspace tests PASS, fmt clean (after running cargo fmt -p ferrotorch-optim under named skip-skill exception). Architect-mode running tally: 10 dispatches total, 8 clean APPROVEs (mps, distributions, item 8 with 1 redirect, core-2a, core-2b, vision-A, vision-B, optim-A round 2), 2 redirects (core round 1 truncation, optim-A round 1 truncation). Crates done: 1/5 mps, 2/5 core, 3/5 vision, 4/5 optim-A. Next: optim-B (39-site SAFETY sweep), optim-C (123-site NumCast cluster), then crate 5/5 (ferrotorch-llama).
